title: BRIDGES TO CHANGE - 211info
text: WASHINGTON COUNTY OFFICE BRIDGES TO CHANGE Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers transitional housing, treatment, and supportive services for individuals recovering from addiction. Programs are led by peer mentors. Intensive outpatient (IOP) and outpatient substance use disorder treatment are available at multiple locations. 1049 SW Baseline Street Suite D480 Hillsboro, OR 97123 Eligibility: Varies by program Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm (971) 386-3443 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (971) 386-3443 Main phone INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or visit website for more infomation FEES: Varies by service. OHP accepted for treatment services. DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Multnomah, and Washington Counties SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Bus Line 57: Stop ID 268, 10129, 4116 Max Blue Line to Hatfield Government Center Services: Comprehensive Outpatient Substance Use Disorder Treatment Ex-Offender Halfway Houses Mentoring Programs * Substance Use Disorder Issues Sober Living Homes If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. WASHINGTON COUNTY OFFICE
